title: × sorbaronia dippelii
intro: × Sorbaronia dippelii, also known as the hybrid mountain ash or Dippel's sorb, is a rare, deciduous shrub or small tree native to Europe. It has been found to possess medicinal properties due to its bark and leaves, which contain polyphenols and flavonoids that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of × Sorbaronia dippelii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions or tinctures made from its bark and leaves, are used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
